# Daily Learning Checklist

## Fundamentals

- Read or watch one focused lesson.
- Take notes in your own words.
- Explain the concept out loud.
- Revisit the lesson if the explanation is unclear.

## Hands-on practice

- Open the lab environment.
- Run commands manually.
- Record useful command output.
- Break something safely.
- Fix it and write down what changed.

## Tooling or automation

- Write or modify a small script.
- Run it.
- Capture the error if it breaks.
- Fix it and explain why the fix worked.

## Documentation

- Write what you learned.
- Write what confused you.
- Write what failed.
- Write the next question to revisit.
